title: Simply Quality of Life
description: Simply Optimized with various QoL mods
body:
<!-- Markdown -->
[![Built on Simply Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/simply-optimized_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)

This modpack is a fork of Simply Optimized adding various additional QoL mods with the goal of not drastically altering core Minecraft gameplay.

Added Mods
==========
- [3d\-Skin\-Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/zV5r3pPn) by tr7zw
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) by squeek502
- [Armor Stand Arms](https://modrinth.com/mod/GWFnD2zx) by Jodek
- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/MBAkmtvl) by BlayTheNinth
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6PXGAoM) by TheCSDev
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/8shC1gFX) by cominixo, TreyRuffy
- [Blur\+](https://modrinth.com/mod/NK39zBp2) by Motschen, tterrag1098, Pyrofab
- [BookshelfInspector](https://modrinth.com/mod/rOrXjyPb) by Lukasabbe
- [Cape Provider](https://modrinth.com/mod/orXAsira) by litetex
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/MOqt4Z5n) by OBro1961
- [Chunks Fade In](https://modrinth.com/mod/JaNmzvA8) by kerudion \(koteinik\)

- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wnxd13zP) by Jared

Added Resource Packs
====================
- [Animated Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-items) by palettemc
- [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd) by CountXD

- [Theone's Eating Animation Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack) by theoness1
- [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) by amongstreality
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)

Added Shaders
=============
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) + [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) by EminGT, SpacEagle17
